summary: The interruption closure manifest materializes the observed text-turn and fetch-shutdown recovery snapshots. Product smokes now prove that an in-flight Codex image queue output returned after cancellation is rejected, the job is stored as cancelled with cancelRequested true, the DF-243 cancel writer persists separate app-storage recovery and cancel-signal JSON, the image partial-resume writer persists a pending-to-resumed recovery snapshot, the interrupted artifact gate writer persists distinct approval/export gate JSON, and local project folder export carries those project-scoped artifacts. The release remains blocked until packaged image partial-resume, packaged cancel, and interrupted approval/export artifacts are captured from the app surface and copied into the canonical evidence bundle.
